title: pseudolysimachion rotundum var. coreanum
intro: Pseudolysimachion rotundum var. coreanum, also known as Korean white everlasting flower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pseudolysimachion rotundum var. coreanum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also sometimes used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
